title: Doc2ArchAgent Networks YAML Schema
description: Schema for architecture/networks.yaml — shared network zones and topology. Security enrichment fields are deprecated here; use networks-security.yaml instead.

network_zones.description: Network zones defining trust boundaries and segmentation.

zone_type.description: Zone classification. Custom values permitted for non-standard topologies.

segmentation_type.description: Network segmentation enforcement mechanism. none=logical-only, higher risk.

egress_filtered.description: Whether outbound traffic is filtered. Unfiltered egress enables data exfiltration.

ids_ips_enabled.description: Whether intrusion detection/prevention systems monitor this zone.

dlp_enabled.description: Whether data loss prevention controls are active in this zone.

default_deny.description: Whether the zone defaults to deny-all for inbound traffic. Zero Trust baseline.

allowed_ingress_zones.description: Zone IDs allowed to send traffic into this zone. Enables firewall ACL validation.

allowed_egress_zones.description: Zone IDs this zone is allowed to send traffic to. Enables egress policy validation.

infrastructure_resources.description: Infrastructure resources deployed into network zones — WAFs, load balancers, logging, secrets managers, etc.

resource_type.description: Resource type (waf, load_balancer, logging, monitoring, secrets_manager, iam, hsm, ddos_protection, siem, vulnerability_scanner, container_registry, ids_ips, etc.).

version.description: Product version. Enables CVE-aware vulnerability checks.

high_availability.description: Whether this resource is deployed in HA mode.

encryption_key_management.description: Key management model for encryption resources.

compliance_certified.description: Whether this resource has relevant compliance certifications (SOC2, ISO 27001, etc.).
